description_md: Pooled-region code: NE, SE, Alley, or Offshore (primary key).
Region description (Northern Inshore, Southern Inshore, California Current, Central Pacific).
Provisional region centroid latitude (mean of member CalCOFI stations; Q01).
Provisional region centroid longitude (mean of member CalCOFI stations; Q01).
Count of CalCOFI grid stations defining the region.
Sequential primary key (one row per cruise x region composite).
CalCOFI cruise natural key (YYYY-MM-NODC) matched by year-month; NULL where the month has multiple cruises (Q06).
Phytoplankton abundance, cells per liter (provisional units; Q02).
Verbatim taxon name as given by the source.
Best-effort WoRMS AphiaID (accepted; partial coverage, Q05).
WoRMS accepted scientific name where matched.
